_comment_recorded_at: Set to ISO timestamp by spike runner once any spike completes. Until then the field is null and downstream tests treat all spike data as PENDING.

AC-001-1.name: Cap-exempt one-off scheduling

details._comment: Set by runSpike1 — flag_exists, cap_usage_before/after, cap_delta. Live run requires SPIKE_NOOP_ROUTINE_BEARER + 12-min wall clock.

AC-001-1.notes: PENDING — design rework needed. Original plan: Routine's TS runner calls Anthropic /schedule API. Reality (post-2026-05-04 UI inspection): Routines run Claude with a system prompt + connectors, not arbitrary TS. To test cap-exempt-via-/schedule, either (a) instruct Claude in Routine to use Bash+curl against Anthropic /schedule API, or (b) build a custom MCP wrapping /schedule. Defer to session 5e.

AC-001-2.name: Executor duration + Opus 4.7 1M math fidelity

details._comment: Set by runSpike2 — durations_ms (per-run array), max_relative_error (LLM vs Python ref), fr_013_skip flag. Live run requires Opus 4.7 1M API + ta-lib reference.

AC-001-2.notes: PENDING — duration of one spike-noop session_01RddNtFkDDSU2tmM1XTJErj observable via session URL after Claude runs to completion. Math fidelity portion needs Opus reasoning over a known problem; defer.

AC-001-3.name: /fire API + deployed-prompt READ probe

fires.claude_output_notes: Claude obeyed prompt: printed sentinel + a date, no tool calls. Timestamp synthesized (LLMs lack live-clock without tool access; the prompt forbade tools). Not a bug — for real Planner/Executor we'll need a connector or Bash for clock access.

details.session_id_uniqueness_check: PASS — fire #1 and #2 returned different session_ids, confirming each /fire creates a fresh Claude session. The 'Resumed session' label in the Claude Code UI is a viewer-side metaphor for navigating to a stored session URL, not server-side reuse.
details._comment_deployed_prompt_endpoint: Spike 3 also probes whether Anthropic exposes a GET endpoint for the routine's deployed system prompt. Not yet tested.

AC-001-3.notes: PARTIAL — 2 of 10 stability fires complete + 200. Critical clarification logged: each /fire creates a fresh session_id (verified empirically via fires #1 + #2). Initial 400 was 'anthropic-version: header is required' — required EVEN WITH the routines-beta header. AC fully PASSes when N>=10 sequential fires hit 200 + deployed_prompt_endpoint resolved one way or the other.

AC-001-4.name: 24h Routines + Channels token soak

details._comment: Set by runSpike4 — pre_pct, post_pct, projected_weekly_pct. Live run requires 24h soak + /usage screenshots.

AC-001-4.notes: PENDING — drives FR-021 alert tier configuration AND ADR-008 reconciliation cron decision.

_comment_deployed_prompt_endpoint: Set by Spike 3 step 6 (R1 driver). null = no GET endpoint found, Tier 2 prompt-preserve test SKIPS in CI. {url_pattern, method, bearer_env_var} = endpoint discovered, Tier 2 ENABLED.
_comment_v1_usage_endpoint_available: Set by Spike 4 step 6 (ADR-008 driver). false = local-counter-only path (current ADR-008). true = adds reconciliation cron in FR-021.
